dashboard.welcomeMessage:
Hello! I'm your NoteMinds learning assistant 🧠

Ask me anything about the document you just uploaded! For example:
- "Summarize the main content"
- "Explain concept X"
- "Compare A and B"
dashboard.tourDocInfo: This is your document. Here you can toggle Public/Private status, add to Favorites, and enable Focus Mode.
dashboard.tourTools: The toolbar helps you download, search, view analytics and fine-tune the document.
dashboard.tourTabs: Switch between Mind Map, Flashcard system and Quiz to learn most effectively!
dashboard.tourChat: Here, you always have an AI Assistant ready to answer and summarize any questions instantly!

common.offlineDesc: Please check your internet connection and try again.

app.defaultMaintenance: System is under maintenance. Please come back later.
app.offlineDesc: No internet connection. Please check your connection and try again.
app.maintenanceSubtitle: We will restore the system as soon as the update is complete.
app.maintenancePersist: If this persists, please try again in a few minutes.
app.footerDesc: AI learning assistant — transform any document into knowledge with Mind Maps, Flashcards and AI Chat.
app.featuresSubtitle: NoteMinds uses NoteMindAI to automate document preparation, helping you focus 100% on understanding and memorizing
app.feature1Desc: Automatically convert long documents into visual, easy-to-understand mind maps in just minutes.
app.feature2Desc: Create Active Recall memory card sets from key concepts, with Anki & Quizlet export support.
app.feature3Desc: Chat directly with AI to get deeper explanations of any concept in the lecture.
app.feature4Desc: Supports PDF, text files, and audio lecture recordings (MP3, WAV, M4A).
app.whySubtitle: NoteMinds is more than a summarization tool — it's a comprehensive AI learning assistant that transforms any document into real knowledge
app.why1Desc: Instead of spending hours reading and summarizing, AI processes documents in seconds. You just focus on learning.
app.why2Desc: AI analyzes and extracts the most important concepts, helping you focus on what truly needs to be remembered.
app.why3Desc: Active Recall + Spaced Repetition via Flashcards — two methods proven to be most effective.
app.why4Desc: Upload PDF, Word, text or even lecture audio recordings — NoteMinds handles them all.
app.why5Desc: Not just summaries — you can ask AI directly to explain any concept in detail.
app.why6Desc: Access from any device, no installation needed. Just a browser and you're ready to learn.
app.resetPasswordDesc: Enter a new password for your account
app.resetSuccessDesc: You can now login with your new password.
app.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the right plan to boost your learning
pricing.faqSubtitle: All your questions about NoteMinds answered here
pricing.downgradeDesc1: Current plan will remain active until expiry
pricing.downgradeDesc2: Please contact admin to request downgrade
pricing.downgradeContact: Contact via Zalo/Telegram or email admin for support
pricing.paymentStep3: Admin will activate the plan within 5 minutes

faqItems.a1: NoteMinds is an AI learning assistant that automatically converts any document into interactive mind maps, smart flashcards, quizzes and direct Q&A — helping you learn 10x faster.
faqItems.a2: NoteMinds supports PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX text files and MP3, WAV, M4A audio files. Maximum file size depends on your plan.
faqItems.q3: What does the Free plan include?
faqItems.a3: The Free plan includes 5 uploads/day, automatic mind maps + flashcards, quizzes, basic chat (5 messages/document) and up to 10MB file size.
faqItems.q4: How do I upgrade to Pro/Unlimited?
faqItems.a4: Click the 'Select plan' button on the desired plan and follow the payment instructions. Admin will activate your account within 5 minutes of payment.
faqItems.a5: Yes. Contact admin via Zalo/Telegram or email to cancel. Your current plan will remain active until the paid period expires.
faqItems.a6: Absolutely! All data is encrypted according to security standards. We do not share your documents with any third parties.
faqItems.a7: The Unlimited plan lets you upload unlimited files per day without daily quota restrictions. Maximum file size is also increased significantly.
faqItems.a8: The Free plan still includes all core features: Mind map, Flashcard, AI Chat, and Quiz. Only daily upload count and file size are limited.

pricing.downgradeDesc3: After expiration, your account will automatically switch to the {name} plan
pricing.contactSupportMsg: Or contact via Zalo/Telegram for fastest support

pomodoro.quote1: Focus is the art of removing everything that does not matter.
pomodoro.quote2: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
pomodoro.quote3: There are no shortcuts to any place worth going.
pomodoro.quote4: Discipline is the bridge between goals and achievement.
pomodoro.quote5: Every focused minute today is a gift to your future self.
pomodoro.quote6: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
pomodoro.quote7: Knowledge is power; focus is the key.
pomodoro.quote8: Don't wait for inspiration; create it through action.
